memory.summary:
On October 13, Andy and Leo meet at a hospital and discuss their startup plan, agreeing to meet at the library café the next day at 3 PM. Leo also mentions a new melody collaboration with Diego and Caroline, planning to meet at the park the following Thursday at noon. They agree to catch up at the park on Friday at 2 PM and discuss their musical collaboration with Samantha at the library café on Friday at 1 PM.

Samantha meets Andy at the town_hall and suggests meeting again the next day at 1 PM with new project ideas. Andy proposes a joint meeting with Peter the following day at the town_hall. Samantha agrees and suggests making it a regular event, with Samantha bringing her laptop for deeper project discussions.

In addition to this, Andy proposes a coffee meet-up with Noor at the library café later that day at 4 PM to discuss mutual projects and the stray cat Noor found in the park. Andy also arranges a meeting with Peter at the park by the big oak tree on Friday at 2 PM to discuss a musical collaboration for the community garden.

memory.summary: On October 12th, 2025, Samantha met Diego at the market late at night to discuss her new project with Caroline. They agreed to meet at the library café the following day at 3 PM, with plans to further discuss details and potentially collaborate. Diego suggested they grab street tacos afterwards, and Samantha agreed, provided there are vegan options available. On October 13th, 2025, Samantha also had a conversation with Andy at the town hall. Andy offered Samantha fresh tea and they discussed new ideas for their project. Andy proposed meeting again the next day at 1 PM and suggested inviting Peter to discuss their startup idea. Samantha agreed and suggested bringing her laptop to delve deeper into the project details. They also agreed to make it a regular event.

They agreed to meet again at the café at 7 PM. This was scheduled after Caroline's meeting with Mei for musical ideas discussion. Later that day, Caroline also talked to Peter at school around 7 AM, proposing to discuss their startup idea over lunch at 1 PM at the café. Peter agreed, and they planned to share ideas for the community garden and zine club during their discussion. On the same day, Caroline also had a conversation with Samantha at home around 8 AM. Samantha thanked Caroline for her help with the community garden plans and informed her that the project with Andy was progressing well. They made plans to meet at the library café the next day at 3 PM to further discuss the community garden project together.

memory.summary:
On October 12, 2025, Diego met with Andy at the park at 3 PM to discuss updates on the new seeds and plans for the community garden. Andy had been discussing details for their startup idea with Leo and Peter, and planned to bring them over for the meeting. Peter suggested a meeting at the café near the park on October 13 at 12:30 PM to discuss an interesting AI project he's working on with Mei. Diego agreed, and the meeting was confirmed. The updated schedule now includes a meeting with Noor on October 14 at 7 PM at Diego's place, meetings with Leo on October 13 and 14, the community garden work with Mei, Andy, and potentially others on October 13 at 11 AM, followed by a library café meeting on October 13 at 1 PM. Peter also invited Diego to join the community garden work on October 13 at 1 PM.

Mei, who was at the hospital, contacted Diego around 10 PM, discussing new seed varieties for the community garden and offering to meet at the bench by the fountain the next day at 3 PM to discuss Diego's knee and the stretches she recommended. Diego agreed, and they scheduled their meeting at the hospital for the following day. The new schedule now includes a meeting with Mei on October 13 at 3 PM @ hospital to discuss Diego's knee and stretches.

memory.summary:
On October 13, 2025, Leo and Andy met at the hospital. Andy informed Leo that he ran into Peter at the museum the previous night, and they were brainstorming a startup idea, planning to meet at the library café the following day at 3 PM to discuss it further. Leo shared that he had met Diego at the train station earlier that day for a new melody collaboration with Caroline and Peter. They decided to meet at the park on Thursday at noon to discuss the details.

Leo suggested they catch up at the park on Friday at 2 PM and also have their meeting regarding their musical collaboration with Samantha at the library café on Friday at 1 PM. Both agreed to meet at the library café on Friday at 1 PM and the park on Friday at 2 PM.

During the conversation, Leo also discussed the AI project with Caroline and Peter. Caroline agreed to meet him at the library café the following day at 2 PM to discuss it. Peter suggested involving Noor in the discussion and proposed meeting under the big oak tree the same day at 3 PM. Leo agreed, and they planned to bring their respective contributions (violin, sketches, and coffee).

Leo's upcoming schedule now includes a musical discussion with Andy on October 14 at the park in the afternoon, a meeting with Samantha at the library café on the same day, and a musical collaboration and AI project meeting with Peter and Noor at the park on October 19. Peter's schedule was updated to include a meeting with Mei and Peter for the startup idea at the park on October 13, and an AI project meeting with Leo and Noor on the same day.
